name: Ancient Kingdom of Hadramaut
description: The ancient Hadramite kingdom occupied the wadi system that bears its name, with its capital at Shabwa — the great frankincense emporium. CEFAS French excavations revealed a sophisticated palatial mudbrick architecture at Shabwa that directly prefigures the Shibam high-rise tradition 3,000 years later, demonstrating one of the most extraordinary civilisational continuities in the built world.
